message:
chore: clean up imports, remove dead code after UX redesign

- Remove unused imports from projects.ts (formatTimeAmPm, formatTime)
- Remove unused imports from session.ts (formatTimeAmPm, formatTime)
- Fix config.test.ts to include summary_instructions field
- All view files now correctly import only from helpers.ts
- No duplicate escapeHtml definitions found
- Old /api/conversations route already removed
